jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Rivigo
jsonLd.description:
Rivigo invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
